description: Bitly is a link management platform for creating shortened links, branded short domains, QR codes, campaigns, and related analytics. It also provides AI-agent access to Bitly functionality through an MCP server.
summary: Bitly exposes a REST API at `https://api-ssl.bitly.com/v4` and a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://api-ssl.bitly.com/v4/mcp`; both require authentication, with the MCP server supporting either Bitly bearer API tokens or OAuth.
